overall_assessment: P1's paper_core inventory is HIGH QUALITY and reproduces to the artifacts. All ten hardest-check load-bearing numbers (morphology 0.250/0.375, segmentation 0.436, metrology p=1.0, cross-script 0.020/0.0145, gate 0.6%, CSA clamp, KU-RO 17x, 259>212, LLM-ablation, Ugaritic-Hebrew 0.0055) VERIFIED against their cited json/finding artifacts. The CSA-clamp contradiction (deposited LA-scale value is a size-276 endpoint clamp, not a 600-700-word measurement; invariant-12 break in submitted TACL #11385) is CORRECTLY and precisely reported by P1. NO MATERIAL ERRORS. NO fabricated/misclassified LA readings. Verdict-semantics discipline (NO_POWER != refutation, SOURCE_BLOCKED != negative, circularity flagged, WITHDRAWN claims excluded) is applied correctly throughout. Only 1 row downgraded to VERIFIED_WITH_MINOR_CORRECTION (PC-37 secondary figure REPORT_ONLY) and 2 minor semantics nits, all cosmetic.
